import re
spans=[]
for m in re.finditer(r'["“”«»\']([^"]{10,200}?)["“”\']', text):
    s=m.group(1)
    # require Arabic letters
    if re.search(r'[\u0600-\u06FF]', s):
        spans.append((m.start(1), s))
spans[:20], len(spans)

sp_list=[]
# from initial quoted spans
for start,s in spans:
    sp_list.append((start, s))
# from hits
for start,s in hits:
    sp_list.append((start, s))
# sort
sp_list=sorted(sp_list, key=lambda x: x[0])
# ensure spans match raw text; trim edges per rules: remove surrounding punctuation -- but our spans were extracted from regex capturing; verify raw slice equals s
final=[]
for start,s in sp_list:
    end=start+len(s)
    assert text[start:end]==s, (start,end,s, text[start:end][:50])
    final.append((start,end,s))
final

resolved=[]
for orig_start,s in sp_list:
    idx = text.find(s)
    if idx==-1:
        # try with stripping quotes
        idx2 = text.find(s.strip())
        idx=idx2
    if idx==-1:
        raise Exception("not found:"+s[:20])
    resolved.append((idx, idx+len(s), s))
resolved
